Pre-natal Yoga Registration
Please fill in your details below so we can tailor every session to your needs.
Your privacy matters. The information you share on this form will be used solely to guide your initial interview and class recommendations — it stays between you and your yoga coach.
To ensure every session is safe and suited to your needs, please keep your yoga coach informed of any physical conditions or pregnancy-related changes as they arise. The more we know, the better we can support your practice.
Personal Information
Pregnancy History
Physical & Psychological Health
Emergency Contact & Physician
Liability Waiver & Signature
As with any physical activity, yoga carries an inherent risk of injury. It is not a substitute for professional medical diagnosis or treatment, and we always encourage students to consult a healthcare provider about any existing conditions before beginning practice.

By participating, students acknowledge these risks and agree to release Samatvalife Yoga and Wellness and its team from any liability arising from their yoga practice or related activities.

I am participating in classes, workshops or trainings with Samatvalife Yoga and Wellness. I am aware of the physical risks involved and understand it is my responsibility to consult with my doctor regarding my participation. I assume responsibility for any risk or injury I may sustain as a result of participation.
Thank you!
Thanks for the registration. Our team will review the details and get back to you shortly.
